## 🔮 Leo Weekly Horoscope

Hey Leo, this week is all about taking care of the everyday stuff. You might feel a little overwhelmed by responsibilities at work or at home, but try to stay focused on one task at a time and you'll get through it. Don't be afraid to ask for help when you need it - your friends and family are there to support you. Expect a financial boost, maybe from a long-overdue payment or a successful sale of something you've been trying to get rid of. Use this extra cash wisely and put it towards something you've been putting off, like a home repair or a vacation. You'll also have a chance to reconnect with an old friend or acquaintance this week, which could lead to a new opportunity or a renewed connection. Keep your social calendar light and don't overcommit yourself.

---

## 🔮 Leo Monthly Horoscope

May 2026 is looking like a great month for Leos, with a strong focus on personal growth and self-improvement. Expect to feel a renewed sense of confidence and motivation, which will help you tackle any challenges that come your way. Your creativity and problem-solving skills are on point, making you a valuable asset to your team or community. This is a good time to take on new projects or pursue a hobby you've been putting off. Be open to learning from others and trying new things - you might be surprised at how much you can learn. Romantic relationships are also looking up, with a chance to reconnect with a loved one or meet someone new. Just be sure to communicate openly and honestly to avoid any misunderstandings. Overall, May is a great time to shine your light and make progress on your goals.

---
